base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: reduce tail MAE without materially reducing net profit or trade count
expected_effect: Should reduce or remove the -527 charm_pin_pullback_long tail and improve average MAE/exposure quality. Trade count and net profit may fall modestly if the signature catches a few profitable but slow charm-pin recoveries; reject if retained net profit drops below 98% of run_001 or fast winners are materially reduced.
label: charm-pin-tail-risk-capture
rationale: The latest bad-MAE evidence points to a profitable but tail-heavy charm_pin_pullback_long cluster, not a missing-0DTE problem. The worst trade had VALID_0DTE, ES-VWAP distance 26.20, negative VWAP acceleration, weak RSI/ADX, pullback from high 9.75, rolling-high distance 14.75, and setup 61.99. This experiment uses the existing profile-matched charm-pin tail-risk veto path rather than repeating failed no-0DTE fallback tightening or broad extended-VWAP pruning.
